name: Adventure Modpack
summary: Vanilla-plus adventure server with Terralith, Incendium, seasons, and a bunch of other mods.
_comment: This manifest is the source for build-modpack.sh. The 'files' array is populated at build time from the client mod list below. Only 'both' and 'client' side mods go in the pack - server-only mods are excluded.

_clientMods._comment: Modrinth slugs for mods that clients need (side=both or side=client). build-modpack.sh resolves these to download URLs and populates 'files'.
_clientMods._stableOnlyComment: stableOnly: resolver picks the newest RELEASE for these slugs instead of the newest build of any channel. Use for mods whose pre-release channels have burned us. Everything else gets the newest build - mod authors keep their own latest sets coherent (e.g. supplementaries release requires sodium beta).
_clientMods._holdsComment: holds: slugs pin-mod-versions.sh must NOT re-pin, keyed by slug with the reason. Remove an entry only when its blocker clears.

holds.xaeros-world-map: 1.42.0 removed Waypoint's int x/y/z fields; maplink 4.4.0's @Accessor mixin hard-crashes the client on map open. Hold at 1.41.2 (9ts5xgne) until a maplink release supports WM 1.42+.
holds.xaeros-minimap: era-pair of xaeros-world-map 1.41.2 - held at 26.1.0 (UlRSujUV); bump both together when the maplink hold clears

_shaderPacks._comment: Modrinth slugs for shader packs. build-modpack.sh downloads these into overrides/shaderpacks/.

_resourcePacks._comment: Modrinth slugs for resource packs. build-modpack.sh resolves each to its newest MC_VERSION-tagged version and downloads into overrides/resourcepacks/ so they auto-install with the modpack. An entry may also be an object {slug, files: [...]} to additionally download the named companion files (micropacks) from that same version. Packs are ENABLED by filename in overrides/configureddefaults/options.txt (last entry = highest priority); the build fails if an enabled filename wasn't downloaded, which catches filename drift after a pack updates.

packs._comment: Human villagers/illagers/zombies via EMF+ETF (CC-BY-SA-4.0, by BishopMCNuggets). FreshAni Activator makes it drive Fresh Animations; FA Iron Golem Remover keeps golems vanilla-style - drop it (and its options.txt entry) for HEVI's human-soldier golems.
